items.title: Along with Robert Williams III, The Stein Line notes that the Celtics are interested in free agent Kevon Looney.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Along with Robert Williams III, The Stein Line notes that the Celtics are interested in free agent Kevon Looney.

Primarily due to a knee injury, Looney only appeared in 21 games last season.

He averaged 2.8 points & 5.6 rebounds in 14.7 minutes of floor time.

items.title: As the Celtics assess their options with the 27th pick in the draft, Jayden Quaintance could fall to them for the same reason Robert Williams III did.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
As the Celtics assess their options with the 27th pick in the draft, Jayden Quaintance could fall to them for the same reason Robert Williams III did.

I studied Quaintance's games against St. John's, Duke, Alabama, & Florida to form a scouting report on the former ASU & Kentucky standout.
